findings.criterion: Scenario should specify the drag-and-drop of a product item into the designated drop area and assert that the cart shows title, unit price, and quantity.

evidence.quote: The system should allow users to drag and drop product items(data-testid="product-item-1", data-testid="product-item-2", etc.) into a designated drop area (id="div1", data-testid="drop-area") to add them to the cart.
When the user drags the product item with data-testid "product-item-2" and drops it into the drop area with data-testid "drop-area"
Then the cart display should show a product with title "JavaScript: The Definitive Guide"

findings.reasoning: The requirement's preconditions (page loaded, visible product items, presence of the drop area) and actor action (drag product item into drop area) are reflected by the Given/When steps. The Then steps assert the observable outcomes required by the contract: product title, price, and quantity appear in the cart display. The scenario targets product-item-2 and the drop-area (data-testid), which matches the requirement's UI anchors (data-testid and/or id) and the expected cart fields (title, unit price, quantity).
